posts.content:
Reproducing all of Jürgen Schmidhuber’s papers (1990-2025) using an AI coding assistant.

Cool project by Yaroslav! It even reproduced the “World Models” paper by me and Schmidhuber (2018) using a toy environment, with a full VAE + RNN world model implementation.

Project: github.com/cybertronai/...

xPosts.content: Don't miss David Ha @hardmaru's keynote at @ALifeConf #ALIFE2021 on 'World Models and Attention for Reinforcement Learning'!
xPosts.highlights: David Ha gave a keynote on world models and attention for reinforcement learning at ALIFE 2021.
xPosts.worthReading: Highlights Ha's work on world models, a key concept in AI.
